sources.name: State Council
sources.notes: Central policy announcements and State Council releases.

sources.name: National Development and Reform Commission
sources.notes: Industrial policy, pricing policy, and development plans.

sources.name: Ministry of Finance
sources.notes: Fiscal policy, budget, and government bond notices.

sources.name: National Bureau of Statistics
sources.notes: Official GDP, CPI, PMI, industrial output, and property data.

sources.name: General Administration of Customs
sources.notes: Trade data, customs notices, and import/export controls.

sources.name: People's Bank of China
sources.notes: Monetary policy, credit data, rates, and market operations.

sources.name: Ministry of Commerce
sources.notes: Trade policy, export controls, sanctions, and commerce notices.

sources.name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs
sources.notes: Diplomatic statements and spokesperson remarks.

sources.name: Ministry of National Defense
sources.notes: Defense ministry releases and military exercise statements.

sources.name: China Securities Regulatory Commission
sources.notes: Capital market regulation, enforcement, and listed-company policy.

sources.name: State Administration for Market Regulation
sources.notes: Antitrust, product quality, and market regulation.

sources.name: Cyberspace Administration of China
sources.notes: Internet, data, and cybersecurity regulation.

sources.name: Ministry of Industry and Information Technology
sources.notes: Industrial policy, telecom, semiconductor, and NEV information.

sources.name: Ministry of Science and Technology
sources.notes: Science policy, research plans, and technology programs.

sources.name: National Health Commission
sources.notes: Public health notices and disease control policy.

sources.name: China CDC
sources.notes: Disease surveillance and technical public health releases.

sources.name: National Medical Products Administration
sources.notes: Drug, device, and vaccine approvals or enforcement actions.

sources.name: Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development
sources.notes: Housing and urban construction policy.

sources.name: Ministry of Natural Resources
sources.notes: Land supply, natural resources, and construction-related releases.

sources.name: State Administration of Foreign Exchange
sources.notes: FX reserves, balance of payments, and foreign exchange policy.

sources.name: Shanghai Stock Exchange
sources.notes: Listed company announcements and exchange notices.

sources.name: Shenzhen Stock Exchange
sources.notes: Listed company announcements and exchange notices.

sources.name: Beijing Stock Exchange
sources.notes: Listed company announcements and exchange notices.

sources.name: CNINFO
sources.notes: Main disclosure platform for A-share company filings.

sources.name: HKEXnews
sources.notes: Hong Kong listed-company announcements.

sources.name: Xinhua
sources.notes: Official media cross-check, not a resolution source by itself.

sources.name: People's Daily
sources.notes: Official media cross-check, not a resolution source by itself.

sources.name: Caixin
sources.notes: Professional Chinese reporting and policy/market interpretation; watch paywall snippets.

sources.name: Yicai
sources.notes: Chinese financial and policy reporting.

sources.name: Cailian Press
sources.notes: Fast Chinese market news and policy-sensitive event flow.

sources.name: Securities Times
sources.notes: Chinese securities and listed-company policy coverage.

sources.name: Wallstreetcn
sources.notes: Fast market interpretation; use as signal discovery and cross-check.

sources.name: The Paper
sources.notes: Chinese reporting on policy, local government, and social events.

sources.name: 21st Century Business Herald
sources.notes: Chinese business reporting and policy interpretation.

sources.name: China Money
sources.notes: Interbank market data, notices, and fixed-income market signals.

sources.name: ChinaBond
sources.notes: Bond market data, notices, and market infrastructure signals.

sources.name: Securities Association of China
sources.notes: Industry association notices and securities market professional signals.

sources.name: Asset Management Association of China
sources.notes: Fund and asset-management industry notices.

sources.name: Xueqiu
sources.notes: Investor and expert discussion; account-specific reliability required.

sources.name: Zhihu
sources.notes: Expert explainers and discussion; use only with source quality review.

sources.name: Weibo
sources.notes: Fast weak signals and rumor tracking; must be corroborated.

sources.name: WeChat Public Accounts
sources.notes: High-value Chinese expert essays are common; access is URL/search dependent.

sources.name: Bilibili
sources.notes: Video analysis source; process via bilibili-render-pdf skill.

sources.name: China Court
sources.notes: Court notices and legal proceeding signals.

sources.name: China Government Procurement
sources.notes: Government procurement notices and award announcements.
